Package neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting

Class ExperimentalDataReader

java.lang.Object
neqsim.statistics.parameterfitting.ExperimentalDataReader
public final class ExperimentalDataReader extends Object
Reader utilities for metadata-rich experimental parameter fitting data sets.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    ExperimentalDataReader.CsvOptions
    CSV mapping options for experimental data loading.

    Field
    Description
    private static final String
    DEFAULT_STANDARD_DEVIATION_COLUMN
    Column name used when no explicit standard-deviation column is configured.
    private static final double
    MINIMUM_WEIGHT
    Smallest effective robust standard deviation scaling weight.

  • Constructor Details

    • ExperimentalDataReader

      private ExperimentalDataReader()
      Utility class constructor.

  • Method Details

    • fromCsv

      public static ExperimentalDataSet fromCsv(File file, String name, String responseName, String responseUnit, String[] dependentVariableNames, String[] dependentVariableUnits) throws IOException
      Reads an experimental data set from a CSV file.
      Parameters:
      file - CSV file with a header row
      name - data set name
      responseName - response name and default measured-value column
      responseUnit - response unit used in the resulting data set
      dependentVariableNames - independent variable names and default column names
      dependentVariableUnits - independent variable units used in the resulting data set
      Returns:
      experimental data set
      Throws:
      IOException - if the file cannot be read

    • fromCsv

      public static ExperimentalDataSet fromCsv(File file, ExperimentalDataReader.CsvOptions options) throws IOException
      Reads an experimental data set from a CSV file.
      Parameters:
      file - CSV file with a header row
      options - CSV mapping options
      Returns:
      experimental data set
      Throws:
      IOException - if the file cannot be read
      IllegalArgumentException - if required columns are missing or values are invalid

    • fromJson

      public static ExperimentalDataSet fromJson(String json) throws IOException
      Reads an experimental data set from JSON text.
      Parameters:
      json - JSON text
      Returns:
      experimental data set
      Throws:
      IOException - if parsing fails

    • fromJson

      public static ExperimentalDataSet fromJson(File file) throws IOException
      Reads an experimental data set from a JSON file.
      Parameters:
      file - JSON file
      Returns:
      experimental data set
      Throws:
      IOException - if reading or parsing fails

    • fromYaml

      public static ExperimentalDataSet fromYaml(String yaml) throws IOException
      Reads an experimental data set from YAML text.
      Parameters:
      yaml - YAML text
      Returns:
      experimental data set
      Throws:
      IOException - if parsing fails

    • fromYaml

      public static ExperimentalDataSet fromYaml(File file) throws IOException
      Reads an experimental data set from a YAML file.
      Parameters:
      file - YAML file
      Returns:
      experimental data set
      Throws:
      IOException - if reading or parsing fails

    • fromTree

      private static ExperimentalDataSet fromTree(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode root)
      Converts a parsed JSON/YAML tree to an experimental data set.
      Parameters:
      root - parsed data tree
      Returns:
      experimental data set

    • parseCsvLine

      private static List<String> parseCsvLine(String line)
      Parses one CSV line using RFC4180-style quote handling.
      Parameters:
      line - CSV line
      Returns:
      parsed column values

    • createHeaderIndex

      private static Map<String,Integer> createHeaderIndex(List<String> header)
      Creates a map from header names to zero-based column indexes.
      Parameters:
      header - parsed header values
      Returns:
      header index map

    • getColumnValue

      private static String getColumnValue(List<String> values, Map<String,Integer> headerIndex, String column)
      Returns a required column value.
      Parameters:
      values - row values
      headerIndex - header index map
      column - column name
      Returns:
      column value text

    • optionalColumnValue

      private static String optionalColumnValue(List<String> values, Map<String,Integer> headerIndex, String column)
      Returns an optional column value.
      Parameters:
      values - row values
      headerIndex - header index map
      column - optional column name
      Returns:
      column value text, or unknown when unavailable

    • parseDouble

      private static double parseDouble(String value, String column, int lineNumber)
      Parses a finite double value from CSV text.
      Parameters:
      value - value text
      column - column name
      lineNumber - one-based line number
      Returns:
      parsed value

    • convertAbsoluteValue

      private static double convertAbsoluteValue(String variableName, double value, String fromUnit, String toUnit)
      Converts an absolute value between recognized units.
      Parameters:
      variableName - variable name used for diagnostics
      value - value to convert
      fromUnit - source unit
      toUnit - target unit
      Returns:
      converted value

    • convertDeltaValue

      private static double convertDeltaValue(String variableName, double value, String fromUnit, String toUnit)
      Converts a standard deviation between recognized units without applying offsets.
      Parameters:
      variableName - variable name used for diagnostics
      value - standard deviation value
      fromUnit - source unit
      toUnit - target unit
      Returns:
      converted standard deviation

    • sameOrEmptyUnit

      private static boolean sameOrEmptyUnit(String fromUnit, String toUnit)
      Returns whether units are effectively equal or unspecified.
      Parameters:
      fromUnit - source unit
      toUnit - target unit
      Returns:
      true if no conversion is needed

    • isTemperatureUnit

      private static boolean isTemperatureUnit(String unit)
      Returns whether a unit is a recognized temperature unit.
      Parameters:
      unit - unit text
      Returns:
      true for K, C, F, or R

    • isPressureUnit

      private static boolean isPressureUnit(String unit)
      Returns whether a unit is a recognized pressure unit.
      Parameters:
      unit - unit text
      Returns:
      true for common pressure units supported by NeqSim

    • readText

      private static String readText(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode node, String field, String defaultValue)
      Reads a text value from a JSON/YAML node.
      Parameters:
      node - parent node
      field - field name
      defaultValue - fallback value
      Returns:
      text value or fallback

    • readDouble

      private static double readDouble(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.JsonNode node, String field)
      Reads a required double value from a JSON/YAML node.
      Parameters:
      node - parent node
      field - field name
      Returns:
      double value

      field - field name
      Returns:
      string array
